import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
let n = lines.len()
mut i = 0
mut idx = 0
while i < n
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let is_last_empty = i == n - 1 and string.is_empty(line)
    if not is_last_empty
      println("[#{idx}] #{line}")
      idx = idx + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
